headline: 暑期档新片激战，痴迷火遮眼领跑
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Heat Up, 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' Lead
summary: 今日两部新片上映，本周共四部新片。痴迷与火遮眼持续霸榜，草原上的小木屋和海洋奇缘：启航紧随其后。
summaryEn: Two movies released today, four this week. 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' dominate charts, followed by 'Little House on the Prairie' and 'Moana: Voyage'.

industryHighlights.text: 动画续集《海洋奇缘：启航》本周热度不减
industryHighlights.en: Animated sequel 'Moana: Voyage' remains hot this week

industryHighlights.text: 恐怖片《鬼玩人6》口碑两极分化
新片《末日地堡》跻身周榜前五
industryHighlights.en: New film 'The Silo' enters weekly top five

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》预告片引粉丝期待
industryHighlights.en: Trailer for 'The Legend of Aang' excites fans
